text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Urgh! My head's been throbbin' like crazy since
this mornin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It is what it is. Guess I'll just wrap a headband
'round it for now.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Why? Haven't ya heard? The best cure for a
headache is a headband!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If ya tie a headband 'round your temples, it'll help
relieve the pain.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: The look on your face says ya don't believe me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Pretty sure I remember hearin' somethin' about
easin' the pain by applyin' pressure to the blood
vessels in your head...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Thinkin' hard is makin' it hurt more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I advise Inari One to take medicine instead of
using a headband, but the headache continues to
plague her for a while.
